qa_pairs.question: What web browsers are supported for accessing the Horizon Web UI for Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Firefox and Chrome browsers are supported for accessing the Horizon Web UI for Arbutus Cloud; Safari and Edge may work but have not been validated.

qa_pairs.question: What Arbutus Cloud resources will be pre-created for users in the new Arbutus Cloud environment?
qa_pairs.answer: Your Arbutus Cloud Project (Tenant), Network, and Router will be pre-created for you in the new Arbutus Cloud, and you will have access to the same projects as you had on the Legacy Arbutus Cloud.

qa_pairs.question: Why might new Security Groups be necessary when migrating to the new Arbutus Cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: New Security Groups (OpenStack’s firewall rules) may be required when migrating to the new Arbutus Cloud because the new cloud uses different floating IP address ranges than the legacy Arbutus Cloud.
